allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas, numpy, matplotlib, tkinter; print\('all libs OK:', pandas.__version__, numpy.__version__, matplotlib.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "import pandas, numpy, matplotlib, tkinter; print\('all libs OK', pandas.__version__, numpy.__version__, matplotlib.__version__\)")

PowerShell($cmds = 'py','python3','python'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } }; "---"; py -3 --version 2>&1; "---list---"; py -0p 2>&1)
PowerShell(py -3 -c "import pandas, numpy, matplotlib, tkinter; print\('OK', pandas.__version__, numpy.__version__, matplotlib.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\Run Brisket Tracker.bat" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $py = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($py\){ "OK - GUI launched with hover control, no startup crash"; Stop-Process -Id $py.Id -Force; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { "FAILED - no python process"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
Bash(ls "/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/" 2>&1; echo "---"; "/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" --version 2>&1 | head -1)

PowerShell($p = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:ProgramW6432\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($p\) { $p; & $p[0] --version } else { Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:ProgramFiles","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Filter gh.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell("--- cmdkey entries \(gh/github\) ---"; cmdkey /list 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "gh:|github" | Out-String; "--- GH_TOKEN env ---"; if \($env:GH_TOKEN\) { "GH_TOKEN is set" } else { "GH_TOKEN not set" }; "--- config dir contents ---"; $d = "$env:AppData\\GitHub CLI"; if \(Test-Path $d\) { Get-ChildItem $d -Force | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { "config dir does not exist: $d" }; "--- AppData resolves to ---"; $env:AppData)

PowerShell("--- git real path ---"; \(Get-Command git\).Source; "--- XDG_CONFIG_HOME ---"; if \($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME\) { "SET: $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME"; $h = Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME 'gh\\hosts.yml'; "looking for: $h => " + \(Test-Path $h\) } else { "not set" }; "--- GH_CONFIG_DIR ---"; if \($env:GH_CONFIG_DIR\) { "SET: $env:GH_CONFIG_DIR" } else { "not set" }; "--- search any hosts.yml under user profile ---"; Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE -Filter hosts.yml -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Force | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName)
